history.user: Create a floating spawn platform with a forcefield

actions.code:
local spawnLocation = Instance.new("SpawnLocation")
spawnLocation.Parent = game.Workspace
spawnLocation.Name = "SpawnLocation"
spawnLocation.Position = Vector3.new(0, 5.5, 0)
spawnLocation.Anchored = true
spawnLocation.CanCollide = false

history.user: Make a spooky horror night atmosphere with fog and a red moon. Also add a zombie model near the spawn.

actions.code:
for _, obj in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetChildren()) do
  if obj:IsA("SpawnLocation") then
    obj.Color = Color3.fromRGB(150, 0, 0)
  end
end

history.user: Make a spooky horror night atmosphere with fog and a red moon. Also add a zombie model near the spawn.

actions.code:
-- Create a red moon effect
local lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")
lighting.ClockTime = 1
lighting.TimeOfDay = "01:00:00"
lighting.ColorShiftTop = Color3.new(1,0,0)
lighting.ColorShiftBottom = Color3.new(1,0,0)
lighting.CelestialBodiesShown = true
lighting.GeographicLatitude = 90

-- Spawn Zombie
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local ServerStorage = game:GetService("ServerStorage")
local zombieModel = Instance.new("Model")
zombieModel.Name = "Zombie"
local humanoid = Instance.new("Humanoid", zombieModel)
humanoid.Health = 100
humanoid.DisplayName = "Zombie"
local humanoidDescription = Instance.new("HumanoidDescription")
humanoidDescription.Head = "rbxassetid://5754551964"
humanoidDescription.LeftArm = "rbxassetid://144077788"
humanoidDescription.LeftLeg = "rbxassetid://144077788"
humanoidDescription.RightArm = "rbxassetid://144077788"
humanoidDescription.RightLeg = "rbxassetid://144077788"
humanoidDescription.Torso = "rbxassetid://144077788"
humanoid:ApplyDescription(humanoidDescription)

local spawnLocation = game:GetService("Workspace"):FindFirstChild("SpawnLocation")

if not spawnLocation then
  spawnLocation = Instance.new("SpawnLocation", game:GetService("Workspace"))
  spawnLocation.Name = "SpawnLocation"
  spawnLocation.Anchored = true
  spawnLocation.Transparency = 1
  spawnLocation.CanCollide = false

end

local zombiePosition = spawnLocation.Position + Vector3.new(5,0,5)
zombieModel:MoveTo(zombiePosition)
zombieModel.Parent = game:GetService("Workspace")

project_overview: Prop Hunt játék - Hunters vs Props. Props tárgyakként álcázzák magukat, Hunters megpróbálják megtalálni és kiütni őket.
working_door: A door that opens when clicked. Created by Architect (3D model with hinge/ClickDetector) and Coder (interaction script with smooth animation).
